title: 思い出の味でフィーバー☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Maruzensky goes shopping with two
younger students to help them buy some training
clothes.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
This brand offers UV protection. It's very
functional—and totally fresh to boot! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I used to choose clothes just because the
color was cute or because they were cheap...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You can learn a lot by listening to your elders.
Thank you for teaching us, Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Think nothing of it! ♪ You can ask me for help
anytime! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: So it is. Let's get our grub on!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Are we eating at the food court today? Wow,
there sure are a lot of stores here!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, they have Japanese food and dessert shops
here! ♪ I see you took our tastes into
consideration!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Always happy to please! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That place is selling the same tiramisu I used to
eat as a kid!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The store sign reads, "Bubbly Deluxe - The
Fountain of Youth."

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
My mother used to take me there on the way
back from shopping in Harajuku...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! It says they have Hokkaido melon!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
They appear to sell tiramisu, prosciutto-wrapped
melon, and other dishes you'd serve at a party.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: They sell party dishes? That's so awesome!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
We can't waste this opportunity! Let's have a
party! It'll be off the hook!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
We can't waste this opportunity! Let's have a
party! It'll be off the hook!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Nngh... I know I should, but this place looks so
great...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Why don't we all split some? I'd love to share
those far-out flavors with you guys!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We all buy an item we really want to try and then
split everything with each other.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, melon and cheese from Hokkaido! It tastes
jus' like home!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Like they say, "appreciate the old, and discover
the new." Japan has a long tradition of
incorporating Western elements.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it's the bomb! ♪ I'm glad we're all getting
to try it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is able to enjoy delicious food without
having to worry too much about the calorie
count.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: That's the way! Let's eat up, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Dig in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We all buy an item we really want to try and then
split everything with each other.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Mmm-mm! I'm going full throttle to sample each
and every dish! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The sea urchin, crab, and shrimp are all so good! I
never thought I'd be able to eat like this in
Tokyo!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
These boxes are simply stuffed with food! This is
the best day ever! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah! We'll remember this meal our whole lives! ☆ This is the bomb! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky and the others stuff themselves silly
with all the lavish dishes.
